name: Ship Release Branch
description: Process for shipping a release branch by publishing a GitHub release pointing to the tip of the release branch with version and notes extracted from the codebase; CI attaches the signed APK.
author: ghackett
required_actions: Pull latest changes from origin to ensure local branch is up-to-date
Parse version from self.versions.toml on the release branch
Publish GitHub release using gh CLI pointing to the tip of the release branch
Verify build-installers.yml attaches the signed APK to the release
